name: transferGift
description: Transfers an owned unique gift to another user. Requires the can_transfer_and_upgrade_gifts business bot right. Requires can_transfer_stars business bot right if the transfer is paid

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

parameters.name: owned_gift_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the regular gift that should be transferred

parameters.name: new_owner_chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the chat which will own the gift. The chat must be active in the last 24 hours.

parameters.name: star_count
parameters.description: The amount of Telegram Stars that will be paid for the transfer from the business account balance. If positive, then the can_transfer_stars business bot right is required.
